content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Strong global risk-on (US markets +1.5-2%) flowing through to Indian markets with broad-based gains across pharma, chemicals, metals, capital goods, FMCG, and financials. Multiple held positions are in profit at the open. Focus is risk management on the existing book — trail SLs aggressively on winners, exit binary-event risks, and avoid stacking new entries given the heavy book and 1 stale OPEN order to clean up.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24500,
      "nifty_resistance": 25200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1040.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "CMP 1056.70 vs entry 984 = +7.4%. Current SL 1030 is BELOW entry — needs to be at minimum at breakeven/lock-gain. Trailing to 1040 (still ~1.6% below CMP, within trail-gap discipline) locks in +5.7% on 7.4% gain. Q4 beat, GNPA <1%, sector tailwind intact. Target 1110 unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "CMP 124.12 vs entry 125.10 = -0.8%. Below entry, MACD bearish crossover, but defensive hedge in book. SL 121 holds (~2.5% below CMP). No change warranted; let the macro hedge run."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1735.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "CMP 1757.10 vs entry 1700 = +3.4%. Stock at ATH on Q4 beat (PAT +9%, revenue +26%) and 500 MMT cargo milestone. Promoter stake sale flagged but absorbed by Capital Group. Trail SL 1720 → 1735 (~1.3% below CMP, just above entry, locks in +2% min). Target unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",

      "new_target": 4875.00,

      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "CMP 4630.40 vs entry 4575 = +1.2%. Defense sector at 7-month high with budget tailwinds; thesis intact despite mild de-escalation narrative. Modest SL trail 4530 → 4555 (~1.6% below CMP). Not yet at +2% so not full breakeven trail; small risk-reduction move."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "CMP 7049 vs entry 6900 = +2.2%. Crossed +2% gain, SL at entry needs to be raised to lock in. New SL 6960 = +0.9% above entry, ~1.3% below CMP (within trail-gap discipline). Q4 beat (revenue +34%, EBITDA +80%), sector momentum strong with SRF +6.85%. Target 7400 (near 52w high 7200 already pierced)."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 828.00,
      "new_target": 900.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "CMP 845.20 vs entry 838 = +0.9%. Up 9.84% on day on capital goods momentum. SL 820 → 828 (~2% below CMP, modest tighten). NOTE: Q4 board meeting expected in May — binary event risk. Will reassess for exit if event date confirmed within 3 sessions."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 363.00,
      "new_target": 388.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "CMP 368.70 vs entry 369 = essentially flat but at 52w high (369.30). Q4 beat with ROA +63bps, asset quality improving. Sector tailwind from ECLGS 5.0. Tighten SL 358 → 363 (~1.5% below CMP) since stock has held entry through volatility. Target 388 unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 813.00,
      "new_target": 860.00,

      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "CMP 822.55 vs entry 820 = +0.3%. Stock at fresh ATH on Q4 beat (PAT +18%, rev +22%, 9% volume growth). SL 805 → 813 (~1.2% below CMP). Trail discipline: stock barely at entry but above 52w high so locking in is prudent. Target 860 unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1260.00,
      "new_target": 1330.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "CMP 1279.10 vs entry 1259 = +1.6%. Q4 PAT +124%, revenue +30%, hit 10% upper circuit on results. SL 1245 → 1260 (~1.5% below CMP, just above entry to lock in). Target 1330 unchanged. Monitor for IT-sector mean reversion risk."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2985.00,
      "new_target": 3225.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "CMP 3034 vs entry 3025 = +0.3%. Up 9.2% on day on defense rally. SL 2960 → 2985 (~1.6% below CMP). Q4 beat (PAT +24%, EBITDA margin 16.77%). Stock had 49% April rally so overbought risk; tighter trail justified. Target 3225 unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 798.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "CMP 807.30 vs entry 806 = +0.2%. Up 10.46% on day on Q4 beat (record EBITDA margin 46.5%, non-MF +25%). SL 788 → 798 (~1.2% below CMP). Stock just under ATH; thesis playing out fast. Target 855 unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HFCL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "MIS",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "INTRADAY",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN MIS BUY at 133.50 placed 1737 minutes ago (yesterday) — this is a stale order from prior session that should be CANCELLED but the schema doesn't expose a CANCEL action separately. Flagging in portfolio_notes for cleanup; do not stack new HFCL orders."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1040.00,
      "reasoning": "+7.4% gain, SL was below entry — trail to lock in +5.7% minimum"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,

    },
    {

    },
    {

    {

    },
    {

      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 828.00,
      "reasoning": "Up 9.84% on day, modest SL tighten; binary Q4 event risk to monitor"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 363.00,
      "reasoning": "At 52w high after Q4 beat, tighten SL to reduce risk"
    },
    {

      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 813.00,

    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1260.00,
      "reasoning": "Up 11% on Q4 upper circuit; lock above entry"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 2985.00,
      "reasoning": "Up 9.2% on day after 49% April run; tighter trail prudent"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 798.00,
      "reasoning": "Up 10.46% on Q4 beat near ATH; lock above entry"
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "LAURUSLABS at fresh ATH 1185 with Q4 beat (+148% PAT) — interesting but ex-dividend May 8 (1 session away) triggers binary-event discipline; NO_ACTION on new entry. SRF +6.85% — chemicals theme already represented via NAVINFLUOR; cluster discipline says skip. HINDPETRO Q4 board May 10 (binary), bearish broker stance — pass. VEDL post-demerger mechanical noise, complicated structure — pass. TITAGARH/CAMS/COFORGE/GRSE/MARICO/ABCAPITAL/PNBHOUSING already in book at the prevailing breakout — adding more would stack same-day correlated breakouts.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Heavy book — 11 CNC positions across Financials (PNBHOUSING, ABCAPITAL, CAMS = ~25% of book), Defense/CapGoods (HAL, GRSE, TITAGARH = ~25%), Chemicals/Pharma (NAVINFLUOR), FMCG (MARICO), IT (COFORGE), Services (ADANIPORTS), Gold ETF (defensive). Sector concentration is at the cluster cap — NO new entries justified today. Priority is aggressive SL trailing across the entire book to lock in today's 1-10% intraday gains. The prior cumulative -53.72% experiment-to-date drawdown is severe; capital preservation paramount. Stale HFCL OPEN order from yesterday should be cancelled at next opportunity (will use explicit cancel mechanism if available). Watchlist: TITAGARH Q4 board meeting in May — if confirmed within 3 sessions, exit per binary-event discipline."
}
